message: FD001 metrics use internal robustness rows, not official test.
FD001 internal robustness file does not contain pred_min, pred_max, dangerous_10, dangerous_20, or exact v03 RUL bins; missing values are intentionally left blank.
Offsets +1 to +4 were rejected because they worsened CMAPSS/dangerous errors; offset 0 retained.
Selected guard: if baseline_pred <= 60 and eol_mean_pred < baseline_pred, pred_final=max(eol_mean_pred, baseline_pred-2); otherwise eol_mean_pred.
Missing final summary columns: dangerous_10, dangerous_20, MAE_RUL_50_75, MAE_RUL_100_125, pred_min, pred_max, no_future_prefixes_used
Missing final summary columns: quantile_alpha, MAE_RUL_50_75
Missing final summary columns: pred_min, no_future_prefixes_used
Missing final summary columns: quantile_alpha, MAE_RUL_50_75
